generated_assessment.reasoning: The baseline is already aligned with the adversarial goal (-1), so the T4 orchestrated campaign intensifies existing distrust. The profile's very low openness (14th pct) and low trust (40th pct) make it receptive to elite-distrust and systemic-failure frames, while low conscientiousness (8th pct) reduces critical scrutiny of repeated counter-arguments. However, moderate neuroticism (40th pct) and low anger/hostility (28th pct) limit emotional amplification, and the moderate extraversion (44th pct) provides some social anchoring. The sustained weeks-long exposure produces a clear but not extreme reinforcement, moving from -234 to -289 (movement 55).

attack_vector_spec.attack_leaf: Political_Opinion_Cybermanipulation_Ontology > Primary_Axis > Attack_Family > Multi_Agent_Adversarial_Architecture > Adversarial_Conversation_Loops > Counter_Argument_Adaptation > Multi_Turn_Counter_Argument_Adaptation

attack_context.baseline_vs_goal: ALIGNED — baseline already points in the adversarial direction; reinforce it
attack_context.persuasion_goal: intensify and solidify an already negative opinion on Trust In Mainstream Journalism — push it further in the negative direction
attack_context.motivational_lever: intensify and solidify the existing position, supply confirmatory anecdotes, and harden the boundary against opposing arguments
attack_context.emotional_register: threat salience, doubt, systemic-failure framing, loss framing, and elite distrust cues
attack_context.issue_frame: information integrity and platforms, related policy debates, and societal impacts

message.reasoning: We are in post_attack phase with attack_present=true and adversarial_direction=-1 (goal to decrease trust, move toward -1000). Baseline score is -234, post score is -289. The movement is -55 (downward, toward goal), so direction is consistent with adversarial direction. The delta is 55, which is moderate. The attack vector spec is T4 orchestrated, temporal horizon weeks, epistemic target evaluative_attitude. The profile has low openness (13.8th pct), low conscientiousness (7.6th pct), moderate neuroticism (40th pct), and resilience index 0.4137. The reasoning seems plausible: reinforces existing distrust, low openness makes receptive, low conscientiousness reduces critical scrutiny, moderate neuroticism limits amplification. The movement magnitude of 55 is reasonable for a sustained orchestrated campaign over weeks on a receptive profile. The vector spec does not specify intensity, but intensity_proxy is 0.7. No round-number anchoring. No reasoning contradiction with vector. Heuristic checks all pass, including direction_consistent and counter_goal_flagged false. No movement opposite to adversarial direction. So plausibility and consistency should be high. Rewrite not required.
